package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_map: Services configured by `map[string]any` or similar untyped blobs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule162NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule162NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule162NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario162Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule162NegativeService, input Rule162NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
